programs.title: Forbidden History 2
programs.desc:
People in power do not like it when new evidence appears that challenges established truths and concepts that were previously considered indisputable facts.Some stories from the past were specifically suppressed or suppressed, and anyone who tried to reveal them was detained or condemned - or both.Now the host of the program, Jamie Theakston, will get to the heart of matters that are taken for granted today.It will subject them to thorough research, investigation and analysis.In the next installment of the series, he will take a closer look at the lost treasure of Petra, the real Holy Grail, and the mystery of the Nazi UFO.Each of the six episodes is a different story, a different myth or mystery that has been hidden in the darkness of history for centuries
In this episode, we will learn about the life, work and worldview of the mysterious engineer and inventor of Serbian origin, Nikola Tesla.This extraordinary scientist was the creator of radio and a pioneer of electricity.His most famous inventions include: an electric motor, an alternating current generator, a bicycle dynamo, an autotransformer and a solar battery.The authors of the program show how it happened that, despite his achievements, a brilliant engineer died in poverty and was under FBI investigation.They ask whether Tesla's free energy concept did not cause the government and big business to block his work.Documentarians travel in the inventor's footsteps throughout the United States and Great Britain.

programs.title: The Sum of All Cities
programs.desc: The authors will present the history of selected cities.They will reveal what lies behind the numbers determining population, cost of living, crime rates, temperature and GDP.

programs.title: Mega Building Collection
programs.desc: More impressive buildings will be presented, which attract attention with their scale and represent engineering achievements.

programs.title: The Abyss: The Rise and Fall of Nazism
programs.desc: Using previously unpublished archival materials and citing historical sources, an international team of experts presents a new image of Adolf Hitler's rule.
